title: README.md references removed docs/plan.md
description: README.md (line 21) links to [Plan](docs/plan.md), but this file was intentionally removed in PR #202 and replaced with GitHub Issues as the single source of truth for the implementation plan. The reference is stale and breaks navigation for users trying to access the planning document.

evidence.removal_reason: Conflicts with Plan issue #1; planning state now tracked in GitHub Issues

acceptance_criteria: README.md either removes the Plan link or updates it to point to the GitHub project/issues (e.g., https://github.com/.../issues/1)
Architecture.md also has stale references to docs/plan.md (lines 4 and 123) that should be updated to clarify planning is in GitHub Issues
test_plan: Verify README.md links are not broken
Confirm architecture.md references to docs/plan.md are clarified or removed
